# MainframeStudyHub

> MainframeStudyHub is a free IBM Z mainframe learning platform with 305+ lessons across 15 topics, AI-powered Code Lab, 200+ quizzes, and live community.

## Topics

- [z/OS Fundamentals](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): IBM Z operating system concepts, architecture, and administration
- [JCL](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): Job Control Language — 86 lessons covering JOB, EXEC, DD statements, procedures, utilities
- [COBOL](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): COBOL programming — 60 lessons covering all divisions, DB2, CICS, file handling
- [DB2](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): DB2 for z/OS — SQL, cursors, SQLCA, isolation levels, performance tuning
- [CICS](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): CICS transaction processing, BMS maps, pseudo-conversational programming
- [VSAM](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): Virtual Storage Access Method — KSDS, ESDS, RRDS, IDCAMS
- [REXX](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): REXX scripting for z/OS automation
- [IMS](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): IMS Database and Transaction Manager
- [RACF](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): Resource Access Control Facility security
- [TSO/ISPF](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): Time Sharing Option and ISPF panels
- [DFSORT](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): DFSORT, ICETOOL, and utilities
- [SMF](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): System Management Facilities and performance
- [CA-7](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): Job scheduling with CA-7
- [Linux on Z](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): Linux on IBM Z and z/VM
- [Modernization](https://mainframestudyhub.com/topics): z/OS Connect, Zowe CLI, and hybrid cloud

## Features

- [Quiz](https://mainframestudyhub.com/quiz): 200+ questions across 15 mainframe topics with daily challenges
- [Scenarios](https://mainframestudyhub.com/scenarios): 52 real-world mainframe scenarios across 13 categories
- [Abend Solver](https://mainframestudyhub.com/abends): 87 IBM abend codes with instant lookup and fixes
- [AI Code Lab](https://mainframestudyhub.com/playground): Claude-powered JCL/COBOL/REXX/SQL explainer and simulator
- [Career Roadmap](https://mainframestudyhub.com/roadmap): 6-level path from Trainee to Architect
- [Community](https://mainframestudyhub.com/community): Live chat and Q&A forum
- [Blog](https://mainframestudyhub.com/blog): Expert articles from mainframe professionals
- [About](https://mainframestudyhub.com/about): Built by Harikrishnan K, Mainframe Developer
